## Checklist

- [ ] `bash scripts/docs-validate.sh` passes locally
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated in the `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] `mkdocs.yml` nav updated if pages were added or removed
- [ ] Internal links verified (relative paths resolve correctly)
- [ ] Reviewed by Reviewer/Validator role before merge
